REGISTER: mseccfg
NUMBER: 0x747
MODE: M-mode
WIDTH: 64
FIELDS: -
EXTENSIONS: -

REGISTER: mstatus
NUMBER: 0x300
MODE: M-mode
WIDTH: MXLEN
FIELDS: 63..63=SD, 42..42=MDT, 39..39=MPV, 38..38=GVA, 37..37=MBE, 36..36=SBE, 35..34=SXL, 33..32=UXL, 22..22=TSR, 21..21=TW, 20..20=TVM, 19..19=MXR, 18..18=SUM, 17..17=MPRV, 16..15=XS, 14..13=FS, 12..11=MPP, 10..9=VS, 8..8=SPP, 7..7=MPIE, 6..6=UBE, 5..5=SPIE, 3..3=MIE, 1..1=SIE
EXTENSIONS: -
